tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The Long Run chords
The Eagles 1979   

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Long_Run_(album)

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 2x

[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]  
I used to hurry a lot, I used to worry a lot[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
I used to stay out till the break of day[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Oh, that didn't get it,[/tab]

It was high time I quit it
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
I just couldn't carry on that way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, I did some damage, I know it's true[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Didn't know I was so lonely , till I found you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You can go the distance[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
We'll find out in the long run[/tab]

(in the long run)
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
We can handle some resistance[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
If our love is a strong one (is a strong one)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch] 
People talking about is[/tab]

they got nothing' else to do
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
When it all comes down we will[/tab]

still come through
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
In the long run[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
Ooh, I want to tell you, it's a long run[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
You know I don't understand why you don't[/tab]

treat yourself better
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
do the crazy things that you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Cause all the debutantes in Houston, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
couldn't hold a candle to you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Did you do it for love?[/tab]

Did you do it for money?
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Did you do it for spite?[/tab]

Did you think you had to, honey?
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Who is going to make it?[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
We'll find out in the long run[/tab]
        
(in the long run)
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I know we can take it[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
if our love is a strong one[/tab]

(is a strong one)
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, we're scared, but we ain't shaking[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
Kinda bent, but we ain't breaking[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
in the long run[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, I want to tell you, it's a long run[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
in the long run[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
in the long run, [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
it's a long run[/tab]
